64236626.flavorText: This one is a real looker.

65611680.name: The Fool's Remedy

120706239.name: Word of Crota

They sowed the First, now reap the Last; forever narrows to a line
Where Light will fade into the past—when all's converted, nothing shines.

339163900.name: Nightshade
339163900.flavorText: Three drops is all it takes.

339343290.flavorText: Take arms against the lions of death, the kings of sunset.

355382946.name: Coronach-22
355382946.flavorText: SUROS invites you to sing as they fall.

357669417.name: Whatchamacallit
357669417.flavorText: What did you say it was called again…?

358788212.name: Psi Hermetic V
358788212.flavorText: No power can be gained by mere exoteric understanding.

367772693.name: Precipial
367772693.flavorText: The best night of your life is yet to come.

381446446.flavorText: The future is built by many hands.

386864872.name: Eyasluna
386864872.flavorText: One day, young hawk, thou shalt sail beneath the silvered moon.

388390591.flavorText: "Better alone than in unwanted company." —Jjenr, Husk

391069235.name: Crux Celeritas IV
391069235.flavorText: What is quicker than the light, if not the dark?

392008588.name: Perpetualis
392008588.flavorText: For soldiers of the eternal war.

393652859.name: Terciopelo-4bl
393652859.flavorText: You won't have time to see me overtake you.

396910433.name: Zephyr
396910433.flavorText: In the cold of winter, we remember that the warm west wind will blow again.

406384293.name: Veillantif-D
406384293.flavorText: Raise your horn. Call the hounds. The hunt is on.

407511664.name: Song of Ir Yût (Adept)
407511664.flavorText: It is the song of endings.

407621213.name: Berenger's Memory
407621213.flavorText: Take your place among the company of heroes.

An army meets, and stands, and falls. Three nobles wage their hopeless war.

411397829.flavorText: "She taught us all to appreciate a good, sturdy axe." —Lord Saladin

412265080.flavorText: Fate will hear your war cry.

413901114.name: Acosmic
413901114.flavorText: How may we endure the desolation of the absolute?

417100299.name: The Guiding Sight

425681240.flavorText: How may we endure the desolation of the absolute?

432716552.flavorText: Above the cloud with its shadow is the star with its light.

480368036.flavorText: "We called her Ashraven for her flight, and the ruin she left in her wake." —Lord Saladin

1123433952.flavorText: Delivering seasonal cheer with unparalleled attention.

1125217994.name: New Pacific Epitaph
1125217994.flavorText: "This isn't happening. This isn't happening. This isn't happening."

1128225405.name: Midnight Coup
1128225405.flavorText: The conspirators were too afraid to kill me—rightly so. I am the beloved father of the people, and the glorious mob would not suffer my death. My sentence was exile.

1135050595.name: Duty Bound (Adept)
1135050595.flavorText: "Due respect, Commander? I was there when the Hive found us on Earth. I was there when we stopped them on Titan. And I'll be there when we wipe them out." —Sloane

1141547457.name: Frontier's Cry
1141547457.flavorText: The sky bled crimson as the hills carried that terrible crack.

1141586039.name: Unexpected Resurgence (Adept)
1141586039.flavorText: "Stasis was the thesis. Strand is his dissertation." —Sister Faora

1141927949.name: Yesteryear
1141927949.flavorText: "Best way to forgive is to forget." —The Drifter

1144014195.name: Dark Decider
1144014195.flavorText: The oldest, shortest words—yes and no—are those which require the most thought.

1150492185.name: Sole Survivor
1150492185.flavorText: Names mean nothing to the dead.

1151688091.name: Undercurrent
1151688091.flavorText: The river embraces all. Struggle is futile.

1159252500.name: Vacuna SR4
1159252500.flavorText: A toast to our love for danger. Fear makes victory ever sweeter.

1161276682.name: Redrix's Broadsword
1161276682.flavorText: The second swing is no less deadly.

1161561386.name: The Guiding Sight
1161561386.flavorText: Forged in honor of Efrideet, and all that inspires.

1162247618.name: Jian 7 Rifle
1162247618.flavorText: Come, brothers and sisters! Let us make way for the new ruler!

1167153950.name: Adhortative
1167153950.flavorText: "So... you think you can kill a god?" —Ghost

1175295126.name: Hushed Whisper
1175295126.flavorText: Quiet now, I'll do the talking.

1177293325.name: Tongeren-LR3
1177293325.flavorText: Long march. Stone road. Old city. Know the land.

1177293326.name: Damietta-LR2
1177293326.flavorText: Taut sails. Wide rivers. Battered towers. Watch the seas.

1177293327.name: Aachen-LR2
1177293327.flavorText: Old kings. Sharp swords. Epic songs. Take the throne.

1178397318.name: Agrona PR4
1178397318.flavorText: Do not be afraid. Our fate cannot be taken from us. It is a gift.

1178397319.name: Battle Scar
1178397319.flavorText: "Do not concern yourself with how many horns I bear." —Lord Shaxx

1178886909.name: Thin Line
1178886909.flavorText: Sometimes you forget which side you're on.

1179141605.name: Felwinter's Lie
1179141605.flavorText: "I just like the name. Doesn't mean anything." —Lord Felwinter to Lord Timur

1180270692.name: Quickfang
1180270692.flavorText: My smile is full of blades.

1180270693.name: Eternity's Edge
1180270693.flavorText: "A sword is a wand that casts two spells: parry and cut." —Tarsem Sauer

1180270694.name: Crown-Splitter
1180270694.flavorText: "Our enemies think themselves gods and kings. Show them the error of their ways." —Callisto Yin

1184309824.name: Sailspy Pitchglass
1184309824.flavorText: There are shapes on the horizon not yet meant to be seen.

1184692845.name: Doom of Chelchis (Harrowed)
1184692845.flavorText: "All is silent. Nothing answers me. The hunger comes." —Chelchis, Kell of Stone

1189790632.name: The Steady Hand
1189790632.flavorText: Forged in honor of Perun, and a just and unwavering resolve.

1195725817.name: Sondok-C
1195725817.flavorText: Your wisdom will lead you to victory.

1197073834.name: Forced Memorializer
1197073834.flavorText: The distant memories still live under your eyelids.

1197486957.name: High Albedo
1197486957.flavorText: "Don't let the Light blind you to what's right before your eyes."  —The Exo Stranger

1197771438.name: Lost Signal
1197771438.flavorText: "I think I've had a little too much peace and quiet." —Failsafe

1200414607.name: The Showrunner
1200414607.flavorText: Once you have one, you'll wonder how you ever did without.

1201528146.name: Exalted Truth (Adept)
1201528146.flavorText: "It's the end of the world. We don't have another choice." —Ikora Rey

1202007252.name: Whirling Ovation
1202007252.flavorText: Forget the pain, forget the practice, forget the blisters under your dancing shoes. Your audience is waiting.

1206729100.name: Wilderflight
1206729100.flavorText: The flightless blind, venturing out into the dark. Never to return.

1207321710.name: Scintillation
1207321710.flavorText: "A paltry echo of the Ascendant Plane." —Toland, the Shattered

1216130969.name: Cold Denial
1216130969.flavorText: A familiar tool in the face of failure.

1216319404.name: Fatebringer (Timelost)
1216319404.flavorText: But where is your fate, and who brings it to you?

1218113510.name: Tusk of the Boar
1218113510.flavorText: Your impending death is no reason to back down.

1225851434.name: TAHOMA 01
1225851434.flavorText: …till we get a call from Washington, do you understand, we have to make the call ourselves and damn the consequences…

1239700299.name: Swordbreaker (Adept)
1239700299.flavorText: If you're going to face down a Knight with an ascendant blade, bring an ascendant gun.

1242785638.name: Sarpedon-D
1242785638.flavorText: A bloody rain. A fitting end.

1246793994.name: Maahes HC4
1246793994.flavorText: Roar with one voice. Rage against the storm.

1248372789.name: Sweet Sorrow
1248372789.flavorText: A scratched-out inscription on the barrel reads, "A birthday is just a number. How about we pick this one?"

1251729046.name: Steelfeather Repeater
1251729046.flavorText: There is strength in delicate things.

1270948323.name: Nasreddin
1270948323.flavorText: This weapon was forged by Devrim Kay VIII for the survivors.

1277015089.name: Gravity Slingshot
1277015089.flavorText: "On the day our ships are ready, the City will see us blast into the sky." —Arach Jalaal

1277470844.name: Backfang
1277470844.flavorText: "As sharp as Psion rotgut and twice as strong." —The Drifter

1280933460.name: Claws of the Wolf
1280933460.flavorText: "Perun's strikes would hit so fast and true that our enemies wouldn't realize their fate until it was too late." —Lord Saladin

1281822858.name: Furina-2mg
1281822858.flavorText: I am ready to defend my territory.

1281822859.name: Harmony-21
1281822859.flavorText: SUROS reminds you that a fireteam is better than a soloist.

1286686760.name: Gahlran's Right Hand
1286686760.flavorText: "A Reefborn autorifle, rewritten with Hive voices to defend Gahlran the failed. Now yours." —Emperor Calus

1289324202.name: Pyroclastic Flow
1289324202.flavorText: There is no minimum safe distance.

1289796511.name: Iterative Loop
1289796511.flavorText: An antique from Neomuna's founding, given new life.

1289997971.name: Breachlight
1289997971.flavorText: It has been melted and reforged many times.

1291040554.name: Brass Attacks
1291040554.flavorText: "If looks could kill, you wouldn't even have to aim this thing." —Banshee-44

1291040555.name: Heliocentric QSc
1291040555.flavorText: What anchors you in the vast cosmos?

1291270049.name: Abide the Return
1291270049.flavorText: "It is what she asks of us." —Paladin Kamala Rior

1292594730.name: The Summoner (Adept)
1292594730.flavorText: Join the dance of fire and birth.

1298672084.name: Perfect Paradox
1298672084.flavorText:
A tale that's different from the rest: the thread unfurls against the clocks.
The one the Speaker loved the best must have a perfect paradox.

1303313141.name: Unsworn
1303313141.flavorText: "No oath will bind me to the past." —Kerrev, the Erased

1310413524.name: Recital-17
1310413524.flavorText: SUROS reminds you that practice makes perfect.

1310413525.name: Victoire SI2
1310413525.flavorText: Victory is a process, not a finality.

1311684613.name: Dimensional Hypotrochoid
1311684613.flavorText: "What is this junk from, that old moon base? What do you mean, 'just refurbish it'?!" —Exodus Indigo Quartermaster

1321506184.name: Qullim's Terminus
1321506184.flavorText: "If only… if only we had heeded the queen…"

1321626661.name: Eye of Sol (Adept)
1321626661.flavorText: "The sun took my sight; thus, the sun became my eyes." —Parables of the Allspring

1325579289.name: Retrofuturist
1325579289.flavorText: They were so optimistic about us.

1327264046.name: Badlander
1327264046.flavorText: "We are a long way from home." —Arrha (trans. from Eliksni)

1327432221.name: Perseverance
1327432221.flavorText: It was a long time coming. But it wasn't the wait. It was the journey.

1331482397.name: MIDA Multi-Tool
1331482397.flavorText: Select application: Ballistic engagement. Entrenching tool. Avionics trawl. Troll smasher. Stellar sextant. List continues.

1331824604.name: Combined Action
1331824604.flavorText: Built with modular parts for fireteams out in the field.

1337707096.name: Chrysura Melo
1337707096.flavorText: "If you hear it, remove your helmet and face the closest Corsair. They will know what must be done." —Queen Mara

1339362514.name: Stochastic Variable
1339362514.flavorText: "However certain we are of our simulations, they always contain an element of unpredictability." —Lakshmi-2

1342668638.name: Pleiades Corrector
1342668638.flavorText: "No, I don't think I'll tell you what it's for. That would be too easy." —Lakshmi-2

1345867571.name: Coldheart
1345867571.flavorText: The latest Omolon engineering leverages liquid fuel as coolant to keep weapon systems at biting subzero temperatures.

1350102270.name: Niflheim Frost
1350102270.flavorText: The chill you feel is death.

1357080535.name: Breath of the Dragon
1357080535.flavorText: "Once Timur saw you, it was already over, whether they knew it or not." —Lord Saladin

1361871430.name: Veillantif-D
1361871430.flavorText: Raise your horn. Call the hounds. The hunt is on.

1363238943.name: Ruinous Effigy
1363238943.flavorText: From the many wings of ruin blows a wind that will reshape this dead world.

1363886209.name: Gjallarhorn
1363886209.flavorText: “If there is beauty in destruction, why not also in its delivery?” — Feizel Crux

1364093401.name: The Last Word
1364093401.flavorText: "Yours, until the last flame dies and all words have been spoken." —Shin Malphur to you, as you journey forth into the unknown

1366394399.name: Tears of Contrition
1366394399.flavorText: Message transmission successful // Message deleted without opening // Resend?

1366917989.name: Tomorrow's Answer (Adept)
1366917989.flavorText: Could you please repeat the question?

1369487074.name: Orimund's Anvil
1369487074.flavorText: "He was the first to forge arms for the Iron Banner." —Lord Saladin

1387987271.name: Silicon Neuroma (Adept)
1387987271.flavorText: "My future is concurrently irreversible and unknowable. Before it overtakes me, I desire a more abrupt end to those responsible." —Asher Mir

1389546626.name: Taraxippos
1389546626.flavorText: A flash of green on the event horizon.

1390080550.name: False Promises
1390080550.flavorText: Gripped in the hands of the desperate many.

1392429335.name: Broadsword Launcher
1392429335.flavorText: Let our monarch's spirit ring out and roar!

1392919471.name: Trustee
1392919471.flavorText: A single word is etched inside the barrel: "Alton-1."

1393021134.name: Nox Reve II
1393021134.flavorText: In the dark of night we dream of the Light's return.

1393021135.name: Nox Calyx II
1393021135.flavorText: Shed the husk of night and be reborn.

1399109800.name: Fel Taradiddle
1399109800.flavorText: It's an unassuming thing, but you'll be amazed at the damage it can do when applied with precision.

1400385226.name: New Purpose
1400385226.flavorText: I see you adorned in spots of blood like fallen rose petals. I see you victorious and bathed in light, I see you.

1401300690.name: Eye of Sol
1401300690.flavorText: "The sun took my sight; thus, the sun became my eyes." —Parables of the Allspring

1402766122.name: Retrofuturist
1402766122.flavorText: They were so optimistic about us.

1402874079.name: Hawthorne's Field-Forged Shotgun
1402874079.flavorText: "What am I supposed to put here? 'It's a gun. Kill bad guys with it.'" —Suraya Hawthorne

1403800851.name: Bite of the Fox
1403800851.flavorText: "Sometimes Skorri wouldn't show herself until she was the only one left who could stand." —Lord Saladin

1405095983.name: Adored
1405095983.flavorText: An Earth artifact, refashioned to suit the Spider's eclectic tastes.

1406475890.name: Agamid
1406475890.flavorText: The lumbering beast stands ready to fight.

1411084669.name: Zenobia-D
1411084669.flavorText: You are the true power on the throne.

1411560894.name: Ahab Char
1411560894.flavorText: I'd strike the sun if it insulted me.

1419158093.name: M-17 "Fast Talker"
1419158093.flavorText: Imperium tech-based firearm common among syndicates vying for control in the Lawless Frontier.

1432682459.name: Fang of Ir Yût
1432682459.flavorText: This is the shape and the point of the tooth: nothing has ever lived that will not die.

1435062001.name: Riiswalker
1435062001.flavorText: "No. I will not allow a Fallen to fight in the Banner, that right is reserved for Guardians alone. But if you insist, I may allow a Guardian to carry a Fallen-forged weapon into battle. You are a weaponsmith, are you not?" —Lord Saladin to an Unknown Eliksni

1439354195.name: Laser Painter
1439354195.flavorText: Light up the battlefield with brilliant colors.

1443049976.name: Interference VI
1443049976.flavorText: Come between your enemies and their lives.

1447836603.name: Subjunctive
1447836603.flavorText: Stop 'em? Pretty sure our deaths are just meant to be the early warning system.

1447973650.name: Rest for the Wicked
1447973650.flavorText: Let them sleep. For a long, long time.

1449922174.name: Tatara Gaze
1449922174.flavorText: The fire in your eyes reveals all truths.

1453235079.name: Hung Jury SR4
1453235079.flavorText: A Scout Rifle, modified by Dead Orbit's superb technicians and specialists.

1456017061.name: Nasreddin
1456017061.flavorText: This weapon was forged by Devrim Kay VIII for the survivors.

1457394908.name: Fussed Dark Mk.21
1457394908.flavorText: Sun's hanging low in the sky.

1457394910.name: Botheration Mk.28
1457394910.flavorText: Be a pain in their side.

1457394911.name: Badlands Mk.24
1457394911.flavorText: Place like this ain't home to the faint of heart.

1457979868.name: Duty Bound
1457979868.flavorText: "Due respect, Commander? I was there when the Hive found us on Earth. I was there when we stopped them on Titan. And I'll be there when we wipe them out." —Sloane

1459443448.name: Escape Velocity
1459443448.flavorText: "The first step toward truth is to let go of all that we know and hold dear." —Arach Jalaal

1460079227.name: Liminal Vigil
1460079227.flavorText: Cause and effect like a looped corridor. I stand. Ever watchful, forever.

1471212226.name: Acasia's Dejection
1471212226.flavorText: Do not believe their lies. Run.

1476654960.name: Judgment
1476654960.flavorText: "The greatest threat to a Guardian is another Guardian." —Emissary of the Nine

1479562935.name: Aurora Dawn
1479562935.flavorText: "The prospect of a future is something we have to keep in mind."

1481594633.name: Barrow-Dyad
1481594633.flavorText: Lay those unquiet thoughts to rest.

1487476133.name: Every Waking Moment
1487476133.flavorText: "Even my idle thoughts are haunted." —Eris Morn

1490571337.name: Future Safe 10
1490571337.flavorText:
See who's robed as if a god, who stands with pride above the rest!
Destroy this ancient nameless fraud! Destroy the one whose death was blessed!

1491665733.name: Briar's Contempt
1491665733.flavorText: "You will never be rid of him." —Briar, Acolyte of Nezarec

1492522228.name: Scintillation (Adept)
1492522228.flavorText: "A paltry echo of the Ascendant Plane." —Toland, the Shattered

1496419775.name: Bane of Sorrow
1496419775.flavorText: "A Reefborn heavy implement, rewritten with Hive voices to make way for Gahlran the failed. Now yours." —Emperor Calus

1502662697.name: King Cobra-4fr
1502662697.flavorText: Only fools dare enter my kingdom.

1505862304.name: Claws of the Wolf
1505862304.flavorText: "Perun's strikes would hit so fast and true that our enemies wouldn't realize their fate until it was too late." —Lord Saladin

1506719573.name: Cold Front
1506719573.flavorText: Sweep in like a force of nature. Leave destruction in your wake.

1508896098.name: The Wardcliff Coil
1508896098.flavorText: Ingenuity. Desperation. A haphazard prototype of terrible power. Such were the factors at play in the Wardcliff Incident.

1513927136.name: Swift Ride
1513927136.flavorText: It'll be over before you know it.

1513927137.name: Disrespectful Stare
1513927137.flavorText: Don't you look at me that way!

1513927138.name: Lincoln Green
1513927138.flavorText: The survivors of that day chose not to remember.

1513993763.name: Friction Fire
1513993763.flavorText: Speed, heat, and Light. Fire away.

1518042134.name: Halfdan-D
1518042134.flavorText: Your name will ring out, your deeds will resound forever.

1518042135.name: Valakadyn
1518042135.flavorText: In dark water, my fangs are bared.

1523647826.name: Eternal Slumber
1523647826.flavorText: "The night sky closes in. We should not be here when the final star fades." —Arach Jalaal

1524387902.name: Seraphine Haze
1524387902.flavorText: A solemn reminder of a dizzying youth.

1525080480.name: Battle Scar
1525080480.flavorText: "Do not concern yourself with how many horns I bear." —Lord Shaxx

1526296434.name: Forensic Nightmare
1526296434.flavorText: We got a thousand bullets and only 999 casings. Find the odd one out.

1529367715.name: Bonechiller
1529367715.flavorText: "It seeps under your skin; settles in your bones. Even outside of its presence, you can feel its chill." —The Exo Stranger

1529450902.name: Mos Epoch III
1529450902.flavorText: The perpetual eventually gives way to the variable.

1532276803.name: Allied Demand
1532276803.flavorText: Rest satisfied with doing well, and leave others to talk of you as they please.

1533499360.name: Athelflad-D
1533499360.flavorText: Make yourself dreadful to your enemies and indispensable to your allies.

1533499361.name: Etana SI4
1533499361.flavorText: The reign of Light will be long and peaceful.

1533499362.name: Urchin-3si
1533499362.flavorText: I will draw them in, then take them out.

1536325168.name: Anamnesis (Adept)
1536325168.flavorText: The Valence has dimmed, but the nature of the Echoes grows clearer.

1540621132.name: Accelerando-42
1540621132.flavorText: SUROS invites you to the starting line.

1541131350.name: Cerberus+1
1541131350.flavorText: "Because three heads are good, but four are better." —Jeza "Jeopardy" Verlayn

1552443158.name: Forgiveness
1552443158.flavorText: "We all seek it, though few find it. The brave offer it, and humble learn from it. What am I?" —Dunya, Ghost of Aisha

1553681400.name: Opaque Hourglass
1553681400.flavorText: Nobody knows how much time they have left.

1555959830.name: Seventh Seraph Officer Revolver
1555959830.flavorText: A thing of elegance from a more civilized age.

1559068369.name: Nightshade
1559068369.flavorText: Three drops is all it takes.

1561006927.name: Seventh Seraph Carbine
1561006927.flavorText: The old workhorse, still with many years to give.

1567585973.name: Judgment
1567585973.flavorText: "The greatest threat to a Guardian is another Guardian." —Emissary of the Nine

1572604081.name: Gizmo Weft
1572604081.flavorText: Now what did this do again?

1572896086.name: Recurrent Impact
1572896086.flavorText: It's enough to drive someone out of their mind.

1574601402.name: Whistler's Whim
1574601402.flavorText: The tune is the same, but the aim couldn't be more different.

1584643826.name: Hush
1584643826.flavorText: "Breathe. Line up the shot. Enjoy the quiet before the kill." —The Drifter

1586231351.name: Mindbender's Ambition
1586231351.flavorText: "Hiraks always did like to leave an impression." —The Spider

1587439031.name: Three Graves
1587439031.flavorText: "No need to dig too deep. Our slumber will not be disturbed." —Arach Jalaal

1587779165.name: Radiant Stardust
1587779165.flavorText: "We are but dust on a stellar wind." —Arach Jalaal

1587953057.name: Temptation's Hook
1587953057.flavorText: A finger of death from which to hang.

1594120904.name: No Time to Explain
1594120904.flavorText: A single word etched onto the inside of the weapon's casing: Now.

1595336071.name: Presto-48
1595336071.flavorText: SUROS invites you to hold nothing back.

1601177201.name: Enyo-D
1601177201.flavorText: The joy of the fight. The call of the battle.

1606497639.name: Harsh Language
1606497639.flavorText: This weapon was forged by Devrim Kay VIII for the survivors.

1612781792.name: Retrofuturist
1612781792.flavorText: They were so optimistic about us.

1617917863.name: Crimil's Dagger
1617917863.flavorText: "She only wanted to help. I know that now." —Lord Saladin

1619016919.name: Khvostov 7G-02
1619016919.flavorText: An ancient instrument of war, battered and worn—but it still fires true. Perhaps it's been waiting for you.

1621558458.name: Gridskipper
1621558458.flavorText: "No stars overhead. Best not to look up." —Amanda Holliday

1621657423.name: Biting Winds
1621657423.flavorText: "The Fallen describe Darkness as a gale. A force of nature, arising suddenly, from seemingly nowhere." —The Exo Stranger

1622998472.name: Vulpecula
1622998472.flavorText: "Ammunition is the universal currency of the Sol system. The Cabal prefer to keep it that way." —Caiatl, Empress of the Cabal

1626437786.name: A Sudden Death (Adept)
1626437786.flavorText: "Everything dies. This is proof." —Emissary of the Nine

1641430382.name: The Guiding Sight
1641430382.flavorText: Forged in honor of Efrideet, and all that inspires.

1642384931.name: Fixed Odds
1642384931.flavorText: An Earth artifact, refashioned to suit the Emperor's modest tastes.

1644160541.name: Abide the Return
1644160541.flavorText: "It is what she asks of us." —Paladin Kamala Rior

1644162710.name: Origin Story
1644162710.flavorText: Your inciting incident is their tragic ending.

1644501332.name: Anonymous Autumn
1644501332.flavorText: A lesson in the art of falling.

1645386487.name: Tranquility
1645386487.flavorText: "They think violence will bring peace. Maybe it can." —Eris Morn

1648948519.name: 1000 Yard Stare
1648948519.flavorText: You can see everything. You can unsee nothing.

1650626964.name: Armillary PSu
1650626964.flavorText: What is the structure of the universe?

1650626965.name: Black Tiger-2sr
1650626965.flavorText: I creep unseen through the darkness.

1650626966.name: Trax Lysis II
1650626966.flavorText: You will destroy them one cell at a time.

1663482635.name: Faustus Decline
1663482635.flavorText: This is hell, nor am I out of it.

1665952087.name: The Fourth Horseman
1665952087.flavorText: It's not a holdout weapon; it's a pathfinder.

1669771780.name: Encore-25
1669771780.flavorText: SUROS invites you to get back on stage.

1669771781.name: Agrona PR2
1669771781.flavorText: Defeat is inevitable… for someone. Make sure it isn't you.

1669771782.name: Psi Cirrus II
1669771782.flavorText: Set your eyes on the sky.

1674692344.name: Sublimation
1674692344.flavorText: A voice not quite your own.

1674742470.name: Autumn Wind
1674742470.flavorText:
"I am the autumnal sun,
With autumn gales my race is run."

1678957657.name: Psi Cirrus II
1678957657.flavorText: Set your eyes on the sky.

1678957658.name: Agrona PR2
1678957658.flavorText: Defeat is inevitable… for someone. Make sure it isn't you.

1678957659.name: Encore-25

4203034886.name: Zephyr
4203034886.flavorText: In the cold of winter, we remember that the warm west wind will blow again.

4207066264.name: Microcosm
4207066264.flavorText: We all owe our existence to one singular moment, long ago.

4209476803.name: Khvostov 7G-02
4209476803.flavorText: An ancient instrument of war, battered and worn—but it still fires true. Perhaps it's been waiting for you.

4213221671.name: Sunrise GL4
4213221671.flavorText: Do not wait for the sun to rise.

4219826183.name: Fatebringer (Timelost)
4219826183.flavorText: But where is your fate, and who brings it to you?

4220529694.name: Avalanche
4220529694.flavorText: If they're close enough to see it start, then they'd better run.

4221925398.name: Cup-Bearer SA/2
4221925398.flavorText: Drink deep from the cup of destruction.

4221925399.name: Reginar-B
4221925399.flavorText: You stand at the head of the army.

4222913208.name: The Hero's Burden
4222913208.flavorText: Forged in honor of Saladin, of all that has been lost and all that remains.

4224667951.name: Heretic's Fervor
4224667951.flavorText: For some, the Drift never ended.

4227181568.name: Exit Strategy
4227181568.flavorText: "If you don't got one, it's time to make one." —The Drifter

4230965989.name: Commemoration
4230965989.flavorText: A single word is etched inside the barrel: "Clovis-II-1."

4230993599.name: Steel Sybil Z-14
4230993599.flavorText:
"Everything I touch falls apart! I see the fragments on the floor!"

"Well, isn't that a good thing? You know, if you're a sword?"

4232480042.name: VS Pyroelectric Propellant
4232480042.flavorText: Archival|Helios|4341| Dr. Saleh, attached see Dr. Bray's redactions along with guidelines on professionalism. A minor workplace injury is no excuse for personal attacks.

4233375372.name: Marcato-45
4233375372.flavorText: SUROS invites you to mark time.

4236134153.name: Hailing Confusion
4236134153.flavorText: "Do not face your foes head-on. Barrage them from above. Bewilder them with misdirection." —Clovis Bray

4238497225.name: D.F.A.
4238497225.flavorText: "Osiris said that he started to pity the Red Legion, getting trapped in here for infinite eternities. I think they're getting exactly what they deserve." —Sagira

4239378215.name: Long Arm (Adept)
4239378215.flavorText: Inescapable, from here to the Outer Rim.

4248569242.name: Heritage
4248569242.flavorText: A single word etched inside the barrel: "Wilhelmina-1."

4248997900.name: Incisor
4248997900.flavorText: An infinitely sharp edge to dissect reality.

4249949938.name: Long Arm
4249949938.flavorText: Inescapable, from here to the Outer Rim.

4255171531.name: The Hothead
4255171531.flavorText: Think of it as a weaponized temper tantrum.

4255268456.name: Skyburner's Oath
4255268456.flavorText: The inscription, written in a Cabal dialect, reads: "Inexorable victory."

4255586669.name: Empty Vessel
4255586669.flavorText: "It's versatile. By itself, it's nothing, just an empty tube. But that's its deceptive beauty; it's all about what you fill it with. What you make it. What you make it do." —Banshee-44

4257236930.name: Mercurial Overreach
4257236930.flavorText: Know your limits, or your foes will teach them to you.

4265183314.name: Multimach CCX
4265183314.flavorText: Friends are as companions on a journey who ought to aid each other to persevere.

4267192886.name: Terminus Horizon (Adept)
4267192886.flavorText: If something heavy's coming in, send something heavy back out.

4272442416.name: The Domino
4272442416.flavorText: "Who will be the first to fall?" —Lakshmi-2

4274165888.name: Greasy Luck
4274165888.flavorText: Death to the living, long life to the killers

4276696962.name: Python
4276696962.flavorText: "If they let you get that close, they deserve it." —The Drifter

4277547616.name: Every Waking Moment
4277547616.flavorText: "Even my idle thoughts are haunted." —Eris Morn

4278664152.name: Alone as a god
4278664152.flavorText: I am the perfect loving god, and all will tremble to know me.

4281371574.name: Hung Jury SR4
4281371574.flavorText: A Scout Rifle, modified by Dead Orbit's superb technicians and specialists.

4284533075.name: Service of Luzaku
4284533075.flavorText: "This one made it for you. It brings death yet promises nothing beyond." —Luzaku

4288031461.name: The Emperor's Envy
4288031461.flavorText: The son's ambition will be his undoing.

4289226715.name: Vex Mythoclast
4289226715.flavorText: …a causal loop within the weapon's mechanism, suggesting that the firing process somehow binds space and time into…

4292849692.name: Crimil's Dagger
4292849692.flavorText: "She only wanted to help. I know that now." —Lord Saladin

4293613902.name: Quicksilver Storm
4293613902.flavorText: Three words. Carved by hand: Affinity. Altruism. Awareness.
